error_no_permission_proposal: No permission to analyze this proposal
error_no_permission_skill: No permission to operate this skill
error_sandbox_no_tables: No tables available in current sandbox
msg_knowledge_saved: Business knowledge saved. It will be used in future iterations.
msg_feedback_saved: Feedback recorded. It will be used in future iterations.
error_python_access: Python step failed while accessing data: {exc}. Check whether the DataFrame is empty or the column name is correct. Available vars: {vars}. Current df columns: {cols}.
error_db_connection_in_use: This database connection is still used by sandboxes
agent_fallback_thought: LLM not enabled, returning general data exploration. Configure LLM for autonomous analysis.
agent_fallback_conclusion: General exploration: sampled 200 rows from {table}. Configure LLM for autonomous analysis.
msg_db_registered: Database connection registered. External DB will be used in the next iteration.
error_sql_multi_statement: Only a single SQL statement is allowed
mock_msg: - Currently in mock mode, switch to LLM for deeper insights.
note_database_dialect: Please follow this database dialect strictly when writing SQL, and avoid unsupported functions or syntax.
instruction_no_code: Please output analysis conclusions for business owners, do NOT output code.
error_parse_json_failed: Model returned invalid format, cannot parse as JSON. Fragment: {text}
hypo_check_llm: Please retry or check LLM configuration
item_check_llm: Check if LLM response was truncated or malformed
explanation_json_failed: JSON parsing failed, downgraded to error message.
constraint_sql_python: - Coordinate SQL and Python steps logically.
constraint_sql_injection: - SQL results are automatically injected as df0, df1... No manual conversion needed.
constraint_multi_table: - For multi-table comparisons, write separate SQLs then join in Python.
constraint_local_files: - **Local Files**: Load uploaded files directly in Python steps.
system_prompt_skill_extraction: You are a business knowledge extraction expert. Please extract a reusable 'analysis skill' from the user's question, analysis process, and conclusions.
agent_fallback_item_1: Add business goals and time range to help AI plan analysis path
agent_fallback_item_2: Upload local CSV/Excel for joint analysis with online data
agent_fallback_item_3: Configure LLM to enable intelligent iteration analysis
agent_explanation_mock: Currently in a mock environment with no valid LLM Key configured or Provider set to mock. AI will provide preliminary analysis suggestions based on the existing table structure.
app_title: SakuFox 🦊 - Agile AI Data Analytics Platform
